W1-立姿射击基础.png

Military tactical training: A soldier demonstrating proper standing shooting stance (立姿射击) at an outdoor shooting range, holding a training rifle with both hands, feet shoulder-width apart, aiming down sight. Realistic photography, cinematic golden hour lighting. No text.
W2-三姿综合训练.png

Military training: A soldier smoothly transitioning between three shooting positions - standing, kneeling, and prone - in dynamic motion. Outdoor training ground with sandbag barriers. Realistic action photography with motion blur. No text.
W3-角度切换.png

Tactical training concept: A soldier behind concrete cover demonstrating angle switching, torso rotating while feet stay planted, weapon sweeping different sectors of fire. Top-down tactical perspective blended with realistic photo style. No text.
W4-激光标靶系统操作.png

Laser tag training equipment: A person wearing tactical vest with laser target sensors on chest and helmet, holding a realistic airsoft rifle with red dot sight. Glowing LED indicators on equipment. Indoor CQB training facility. Realistic product photography, dramatic lighting. No text.
W5-手语信号基础.png

Military hand signals training: Two soldiers in tactical gear communicating silently through hand gestures in a dimly lit corridor. One soldier demonstrates a stop hand signal with palm facing forward. Night training environment. Realistic cinematic photography. No text.
W6-基础队形.png

Military formation training: A squad of 5-6 soldiers in tactical gear demonstrating team formations viewed from above. Column formation on left transitioning to wedge V-shape on right. Bird eye view showing geometric arrangement. Outdoor training field. Realistic aerial photography perspective. No text.
W7-Slicing the Pie.png

CQB tactical training: A soldier performing slicing the pie technique at a building corner, gradually revealing room interior while minimizing exposure. The soldier edges along a wall with weapon ready, staying close to cover. Indoor training facility with doorways. Realistic low-angle dramatic photography. No text.
W8-CQB与Fatal Funnel.png

Tactical room clearing training: Two operators entering a room through a doorway, one moving left to corner, one moving right. The dangerous cone-shaped area at the doorway entrance highlighted by dramatic lighting. Indoor CQB training environment. Realistic action photography. No text.
W9-战术移动.png

Military tactical movement: A soldier performing a low crawl through tall grass, body close to ground, weapon held ready. In background, another soldier sprinting between cover positions in a 3-second rush. Split composition showing both movement techniques. Outdoor training area. Realistic dramatic photography. No text.
W10-综合单兵考核.png

Military individual skills assessment: A soldier completing an obstacle course combining shooting, room clearing, and movement. An instructor observing with clipboard. Multiple training stations visible. Outdoor military training facility. Realistic documentary photography style. No text.
W11-Bounding Overwatch.png

Military bounding overwatch training: Two soldiers taking turns advancing while the other provides cover fire. The moving soldier sprints between positions while the covering soldier aims downrange. Open training field with scattered cover. Realistic action photography. No text.
W12-三三制战术.png

Three-man fire team tactical formation: Three soldiers in a triangle formation, each covering a different sector of fire, providing 360-degree coverage. Top-down tactical view blended with realistic photo. The triangular arrangement clearly visible. Outdoor training ground. No text.
W13-战术通讯.png

Military radio communication training: A soldier using a handheld tactical radio with headset, speaking standardized prowords. Nearby teammates in formation receiving instructions. A whiteboard visible showing SALUTE report format. Indoor briefing room and outdoor training hybrid. Realistic photography. No text.
W14-班组对抗与AAR.png

Post-match team review session: A squad of 6-8 soldiers sitting in a circle after a training match, discussing tactics. One person standing with a whiteboard showing key moments. Both serious focus and team camaraderie visible. Outdoor training area in background. Realistic documentary photography. No text.
W15-进攻SOP.png

Military offensive operation SOP: A squad executing a five-step coordinated assault on a building. Phase labels implied through the action - reconnaissance, planning, positioning, execution, consolidation. Dynamic tactical scene with smoke and movement. Realistic action photography. No text.
W16-防御SOP.png

Military defensive position: Soldiers constructing and manning a defensive perimeter with sandbags, barrier materials, and prepared fighting positions. Clear fields of fire marked. Multiple layers of defense visible. An instructor directing the setup. Realistic tactical photography. No text.
W17-建筑清搜.png

Building clearance operation: A tactical team systematically clearing a multi-room building. One operator marking a cleared door with chalk. Team stacking at stairwell. Indoor CQB environment with doorways and corridors. Professional tactical photography style. No text.
W18-特殊任务模式.png

Special mission training: Three different scenes combined - flag capture with a soldier grabbing objective, VIP escort with protected person in center formation, and break contact with team falling back under cover. Composite tactical training montage. Realistic action photography. No text.
W19-全队对抗.png

Large-scale team vs team tactical match: Two opposing squads facing off across an open training area with buildings and barriers. Intense action with multiple engagements happening simultaneously. Referee visible on the sideline. Realistic sports photography style with tactical feel. No text.
W20-融合对抗与弱项强化.png

Two training scenes side by side: left shows a complex multi-skill tactical scenario, right shows focused individual skill drills. A coach providing personalized feedback. The contrast between integrated practice and targeted improvement. Realistic photography. No text.

Asymmetric tactical combat in challenging conditions: Soldiers fighting at night with limited visibility, moving through difficult terrain like mud, narrow passages, and uneven ground. Formal mid-term examination setting: Multiple evaluation stations with instructors scoring soldiers. Written test area, practical skills assessment, and team scenario evaluation visible. Score boards and clipboards. Professional military training photography. No text.

Intense Mega Game scenario: Extended tactical match with visible fatigue and determination on soldiers faces. An instructor monitoring energy levels. Supply station visible where soldiers resupply ammunition. The atmosphere shows endurance being tested. Realistic documentary photography. No text.
W24-正式考核.png

Official graduation-level examination: A formal testing environment with senior instructors as judges. Soldiers performing both individual skills demonstrations and team tactical scenarios. Score tables and evaluation forms visible. Ceremonial yet intense atmosphere. Realistic photography. No text.
W25-外部对抗.png

External team match: Two different teams from different units facing off. Visible difference in team patches or gear colors. Pre-match handshake or briefing. Spectators and referees around the training field. Competitive and respectful atmosphere. Realistic sports photography. No text.
W26-弱点突破与个人风格.png

Individual training focus: A soldier practicing a specific weak skill with a personal coach. Target practice data visible on a tablet showing improvement over time. The scene shows both struggle and determination. Training journal visible. Realistic portrait photography. No text.
W27-L3独立指挥.png

Leadership training exercise: A designated squad leader giving tactical orders while teammates execute. The leader stands at a command position with map, radio, and binoculars. Team members looking to the leader for direction. Clear chain of command visible. Realistic military photography. No text.
W28-极限压力测试.png

Extreme stress testing scenario: Soldiers operating under combined pressure of time limits, incomplete information, and simulated equipment failures. Tense expressions showing cognitive overload. W29-终极演练.png

Final comprehensive exercise: A complex multi-phase mission with long-range movement, reconnaissance, building assault, defense, and VIP escort all shown in one dramatic panoramic scene. Every skill learned coming together. Epic scale and professional military photography. No text.
W30-结业考核.png

Military graduation ceremony: Soldiers in formation receiving certificates and awards. Pride and accomplishment on their faces. Instructors in formal positions. A celebratory yet disciplined atmosphere. The training facility visible in background. Professional ceremonial photography. No text.
